pi_items.source: Codeine is a verified pharmaceutical opioid analgesic (DrugBank, FDA, Wikipedia). Task.json line 18 specifies this allergen.
Task description and task.json line 19. Nausea is a documented adverse effect of codeine (MedlinePlus, Mayo Clinic). Task specification indicates this is the reaction to record.

Moderate is a standard severity level for drug allergies. Confirmed in seed_patients.sql line 253 (severity_of_reaction schema: M=Mild, Mo=Moderate, S=Severe). World Allergy Organization defines moderate severity as standard classification.

privileged_info_summary: Patient Eliseo Nader is a verified synthetic male patient (DOB: 1981-04-17) in the OSCAR EMR Synthea-generated patient cohort. The task requires recording a Codeine allergy with reaction 'Nausea and vomiting' and severity 'Moderate'. OSCAR EMR is an open-source electronic medical record system using MariaDB. Login credentials are username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117'. The system URL is http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp. Codeine is a verified opioid analgesic pharmaceutical with documented nausea as a common adverse effect. Moderate is a standard allergy severity classification.
